formulas.H_nu_0: [[lambda0+Delta0, etaA exp(i phiA), etaB exp(i phiB)], [etaA exp(-i phiA), lambda3+DeltaA, delta exp(i varphi)], [etaB exp(-i phiB), delta exp(-i varphi), lambda3+DeltaB]]
formulas.sector_displacement: Delta y_ud = - H_topo^{-1} grad_y(delta S_partial^d - delta S_partial^u)|_{y0}
formulas.S_nu_topo_gaussian_hessian: S_nu_topo = 1/2 Delta y_nu^T G_nu_topo Delta y_nu + S_barrier
formulas.S_eff_nu: S_eff^(nu) = S_bulk[Phi] + S_partial^(nu)[Phi] + S_subsurface^(nu)[Phi; ellapse_nu, g_sub]
formulas.S_eff_nu_boundary: S_eff^(nu) = S_bulk[Phi] + int_partialB [1/2 chi_nu^{AB} partial_A Phi partial_B Phi + lambda_nu(nhat) Phi nhat.grad Phi] dA
formulas.S_partial_nu_boundary: S_partial^(nu) = int_partialB [1/2 chi_nu^{AB} partial_A Phi partial_B Phi + lambda_nu(nhat) Phi nhat.grad Phi] dA
formulas.neutral_boundary_condition: n_mu partial^mu Phi + B_nu[chi_nu, lambda_nu, Phi] = 0 on partialB
formulas.explicit_scalar_topographic_boundary_var: delta(S_bulk + S_partial^(nu))|partialB = int_partialB [n_mu partial^mu Phi - D_A(chi_nu^{AB} D_B Phi) + R_nu[lambda_nu, Phi, n.grad Phi]] delta Phi dA plus convention-dependent boundary-of-boundary terms
formulas.neutral_boundary_condition_variational: n_mu partial^mu Phi - D_A(chi_nu^{AB} D_B Phi) + R_nu[lambda_nu, Phi, n.grad Phi] = 0 on partialB
formulas.R_nu_fixed_normal: R_nu = lambda_nu n.grad Phi under fixed-normal-derivative boundary datum convention
formulas.R_nu_robin_candidate: R_nu -> A_nu Phi + B_nu n.grad Phi under a derived collar/Robin convention
formulas.normal_collar_action: S_collar = int_{partialB x [0,epsilon]} lambda_nu(rho,Y) Phi partial_rho Phi d rho dA
formulas.collar_measure: dV_collar = J(Y,rho) dA d rho with J(Y,0)=1 under normalized boundary measure
formulas.collar_orientation: n = s_n partial_rho with s_n in {+1,-1}
formulas.collar_robin_coefficients: R_nu -> A_nu Phi + B_nu n.grad Phi; A_nu,B_nu depend on lambda_nu, epsilon, J, orientation, and edge data
formulas.complete_scalar_topographic_collar_actio: S_collar = int_{partialB x [0,epsilon]} L_collar[Phi, partial_rho Phi, D_A Phi, J, lambda_nu, chi_nu] J(Y,rho) dA d rho
formulas.collar_measure_curvature_expansion: J(Y,rho) = 1 + rho K(Y) + O(rho^2) if boundary extrinsic geometry is derived
formulas.S_eff_nu_profile: S_eff^(nu)[W_nu] = int_B W_nu(y) V_eff^(nu)(y) dV + regularization/width term
formulas.subsurface_metric_split: ds_ext^2 = g_ext,ab dx^a dx^b; ds_sub^2 = g_sub,AB dY^A dY^B
formulas.ellapse_nu_topographic: 0 < ellapse_nu(y) <= 1 with ellapse_nu(y) -> 0 near a zero-exterior-spacetime core
formulas.neutral_projection_saddle: grad_Y S_eff^(nu)(Y_nu) = 0; y_nu = Pi_sub_to_ext(Y_nu); Delta y_nu = Pi_sub_to_ext(Y_nu) - y_H
formulas.exterior_projected_apparent_speed: v_ext,proj = |d Pi_sub_to_ext(Y) / dt_ext| with dt_ext = ellapse_nu dt_sub
formulas.collar_jacobian_shape_operator: J(Y,rho)=det(I + rho S(Y)) or det(I - rho S(Y)) depending on normal orientation convention
formulas.collar_measure_extrinsic_expansion: J(Y,rho)=1+rho K(Y)+O(rho^2), with K(Y)=tr(S)(Y) up to orientation sign
formulas.boundary_trace_K: K(Y)=tr(S)(Y)=h^{AB}K_AB(Y), or sign-equivalent projected divergence of the normal
formulas.topographic_level_set_normal: n_mu=partial_mu Phi/sqrt(partial_alpha Phi partial^alpha Phi) when a regular scalar/topographic level-set profile is derived
formulas.boundary_embedding_X: X: partialB -> B, with local components X^mu(Y^A)
formulas.unit_normal_conditions: n_mu e_A^mu = 0; g^{mu nu} n_mu n_nu = 1 or signature-equivalent
formulas.second_fundamental_form_K_AB: K_AB = e_A^mu e_B^nu nabla_mu n_nu, up to sign convention
formulas.level_set_normal: n_mu = partial_mu F/sqrt(g^{alpha beta}partial_alpha F partial_beta F), or n_mu = partial_mu Phi/|grad Phi|
formulas.projected_hessian_curvature_candidate: K_AB ~ P_A^mu P_B^nu nabla_mu nabla_nu Phi/|grad Phi| when a level-set theorem is derived
formulas.level_set_unit_normal: n_mu = partial_mu F / sqrt(|g^{alpha beta} partial_alpha F partial_beta F|)
formulas.spacetime_level_set_normal_T: n_mu = partial_mu T / sqrt(|g^{alpha beta} partial_alpha T partial_beta T|)
formulas.internal_level_set_normal_Phi: n_a = partial_a Phi / sqrt(|g_B^{bc} partial_b Phi partial_c Phi|)
formulas.level_set_trace_curvature: K = nabla_mu n^mu; internal analogue K_int = nabla_a n^a
formulas.level_set_projected_hessian_curvature: K_AB = P_A^mu P_B^nu nabla_mu nabla_nu F / |grad F|, conditional on projection/sign/normalization conventions
formulas.level_set_collar_jacobian: J(Y,rho)=det(I + rho S(Y)); J(Y,rho)=1 + rho K(Y) + O(rho^2)
